title: Business Strategy Development In A VUCA World ( 2 Days)
subtitle: A 2-day HRD Corp-claimable leadership workshop for building practical business strategy development in a VUCA world habits at work.
whyThisMatters: Business Strategy Development In A VUCA World ( 2 Days) helps supervisors, managers, and team leads turn business strategy development in a VUCA world into clearer expectations, better conversations, and practical follow-through. Participants work through Techniques in empowerment to achieve greater potential and development, Leading through Change: Key Principles needed for VUCA, and 3. knowing the skills you need to have in this current time so they can lead people and workplace change with more confidence.
builtFor: High-potential employees preparing for wider responsibility
Teams that need stronger people-management habits
walkAwayWith: Clarify expectations and leadership responsibilities in practical workplace terms.
Use structured conversations to guide performance and accountability.
Strengthen confidence when influencing, coaching, or supporting others.
Build action steps that can be applied immediately after the workshop.

modules.title: Techniques in empowerment to achieve greater potential and development
Leading through Change: Key Principles needed for VUCA
3. knowing the skills you need to have in this current time

methodologyCaption: Short facilitator inputs are balanced with discussion, reflection, and practical activities so participants can connect the ideas to real workplace situations.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/BUSINESS STRATEGY DEVELOPMENT IN A VUCA WORLD ( 2 DAYS).md
